nasb.text: in order that you may bear your humiliation and feel ashamed for all that you have done when you become a consolation to them.

esv.text: that you may bear your disgrace and be ashamed of all that you have done, becoming a consolation to them.

cnv.text: 好使你擔當自己的恥辱，並且因你一切所行的使她們得了安慰，你就自覺慚愧。

ccb.text: 让你自取其辱，深感羞愧，因为你的一切恶行使她们反得安慰。
